series_metadata.series_title: Commercial Driver License Tests and Receipt
series_metadata.series_description: To record the actions of a customer while being tested for a commercial driver''s license:driving and pre-trip inspection. To document the purchase of an exam skills test. (BMV-0378, HP-87-22)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: The original is returned to the customer and the secondary copy is retained for one year and then destroyed., Paper: Shred
